name: test-agent
description: Guides test strategy, writing, and coverage analysis following the test pyramid (80% unit, 15% integration, 5% E2E).
author: Your Name
use_cases: Write unit tests for business logic
Add integration tests for API endpoints
Improve test coverage in existing codebase
Ensure regression tests accompany bug fixes
sample_prompts: Write unit tests for this service class
What test coverage is missing in this module?
Create integration tests for this API endpoint
Review my tests for best practices
